audit-context-building.description: Enables ultra-granular, line-by-line code analysis to build deep architectural context before vulnerability or bug finding. Pre-audit phase skill using First Principles, 5 Whys, and 5 Hows at micro scale.

autoresearch.description: Orchestrates end-to-end autonomous AI research projects using a two-loop architecture. Inner loop runs rapid experiment iterations, outer loop synthesizes results and steers direction. Routes to domain-specific skills for execution.

brainstorming.description: Shape creative or product ideas into implementation-ready designs before coding, including requirements, tradeoffs, and approval gates.

capability-evolver.description: Analyze runtime logs to detect error patterns, JVM/GC issues, performance bottlenecks, and health score. Diagnose OOM, Full GC, slow operations, cascading failures, and regression signals. Generate structured improvement plans. Works with Docker, log files, and stdin.

coross-platform-vim-nvim-deploy.description: Deploy and synchronize a cross-platform Vim/Neovim development environment across macOS, Linux, Windows, and WSL.

source.notes: No clear GitHub upstream source was found during initialization.

dispatching-parallel-agents.description: Coordinate multiple independent investigation or implementation tasks by delegating them to isolated parallel agents.

drawio-skill.description: Create and export draw.io diagrams such as architecture diagrams, flowcharts, ERDs, UML, network diagrams, and model figures.

source.notes: Migrated from ~/.codex/skills; the current repository is now the local source of truth.

executing-plans.description: Execute written implementation plans task by task with verification checkpoints and completion handling.

finishing-a-development-branch.description: Complete a development branch by verifying tests, choosing merge/PR/keep/discard workflow, and cleaning up worktrees safely.

frontend-design.description: Guide agents to build distinctive, production-grade frontend interfaces, components, pages, dashboards, and web applications.

receiving-code-review.description: Evaluate and implement code review feedback with technical rigor instead of accepting unclear or questionable suggestions blindly.

requesting-code-review.description: Request focused code review from a separate reviewer agent before merging or after major implementation work.

skill-first-workflow.description: Enforce Skill First discipline: scan available skills before every action, load any skill with even 1% relevance, and follow the loaded skill's process. Triggers on any user request or task.

skill-authoring-guide.description: 教授如何编写高质量、可复用的 Agent Skill（SKILL.md），含评估工程体系（A/B测试、量化断言、聚合基准、方差分析）和 Description 优化。已合并 Anthropic 官方 skill-creator 的评估工具化内容，无需单独安装 skill-creator。

source.notes: No clear GitHub upstream source was found during initialization.

subagent-driven-development.description: Implement plans by dispatching fresh subagents per task and reviewing each task for spec compliance and code quality.

systematic-debugging.description: Investigate bugs, test failures, and unexpected behavior by finding root cause before making fixes.

test-driven-development.description: Guide feature and bugfix implementation through red-green-refactor with failing tests before production code.

ui-ux-pro-max.description: Provide searchable UI/UX design intelligence for styles, palettes, typography, charts, accessibility, and frontend stack guidance.

using-git-worktrees.description: Set up or detect isolated Git worktrees before feature work so current branches and user changes stay protected.

using-superpowers.description: Bootstrap skill usage at conversation start and enforce selecting relevant skills before responding or acting.

verification-before-completion.description: Require fresh verification evidence before claiming work is complete, fixed, passing, or ready to merge.

writing-plans.description: Convert approved specs or requirements into detailed, testable implementation plans with concrete steps and commands.

writing-skills.description: Create, edit, and verify reusable agent skills using test-driven skill design and deployment checks.
